section.title: usageUnit
section.para: Describes the unit used to express the cost or size information recorded by a <value> element.
Value description: One of the following values: word, character, token, or a user-defined value composed of a prefix and a sub-value separated by a character : (U+003A).
The prefix is a string uniquely identifying a collection of sub-values for a specific authority. The sub-value is any string value defined by the authority. The prefix xlf is reserved.
section.programlisting: <unit id="1"> <pvn:provenance> <pvn:change agent="gpt-5.5" appliesTo="target" timestamp="2026-05-05T21:08:00Z"> <pvn:usage> <pvn:value usageUnit="tokens">45</pvn:value> </pvn:usage> </pvn:change> </pvn:provenance> <segment> <source>Your annual tax certificate is now available for download.</source> <target>O seu certificado anual de impostos xa está dispoñible para descargar.</target> </segment> </unit>
